narrative:
Mississinawa Valley Local Sd (Darke) school district has 2,243 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
